feedback: The billing system is completely transparent and I always know exactly what I am being charged for. Every line item on my invoice is clearly explained and there are no hidden fees or surprise deductions. This level of clarity builds trust with customers like me.

Recharge plans are too expensive for what you actually get. The competitors offer double the data at the same price point and their validity periods are longer too. I feel like I am paying a premium for an average experience with no justifiable reason.
plz fix ur billing system. got charged twice for same reacharg this month. very frustrating experience
Great value for money on the 599 plan. Totally worth it.

The pricing structure is confusing with too many plan variants that differ only slightly. It takes significant effort to compare and decide which recharge plan offers the best value. They should simplify the lineup to maybe five or six clearly differentiated tiers instead of twenty overlapping options.
Billing is accurate every month. Standard process nothing exceptional.
omg worst pricing ever. they increased rates without any notice. my monthly bill jumped by 50 rupees for the exact same plan. how is this legal

The recharge plans offer excellent value for money especially the annual ones. I calculated the per-day cost and it comes out to less than seven rupees for unlimited calls and 2GB daily data. The billing cycle is predictable and I never face unexpected charges.
Pricing is reasonable for the service provided. Fair enough.
cant blv they charge extra for caller tune when it used to be free. billing has hidden charges everywhere now. v bad practice

Really good value for money compared to other carriers in the market. I have tried three different providers in the last two years and this one offers the most balanced combination of speed, coverage, and price. The recharge plans are competitively priced.
Recharge plan options are adequate. Standard market rates.

The value for money on budget plans is terrible. You get barely 1GB daily data with pathetic internet speed for a price that other carriers use to offer 2GB with much better speeds. The only reason I stay is because of network coverage in my remote area.
Billing cycle runs on auto-debit. Works as expected.
prblm with billing again. extra 99 rupees charged for some service i never activated. custmer care says it was auto-subscribed. total scam

Excellent recharge plan options for every budget. Very satisfied with what I get for the price. The annual plan in particular offers outstanding value and the billing is always straightforward without any hidden surprises at the end of the cycle.
Pricing has become too aggressive. Not affordable anymore.
tbh ok value for the money. not the cheapest but not the most expensive either. average all around

The new 299 recharge plan gives you 2GB daily data with 28 days validity and unlimited calls. For the price this is genuinely the best deal available right now. I compared across all major carriers and no one matches this combination of data and call benefits.
Billing statement is clear enough. Standard format.
ur reacharg plans keep getting more expensive every quarter. same plan that was 199 is now 249. no improvement in service just higher pricing. where is the value
Value for money is okay I guess. Nothing to rave about.

I have been a customer for five years and the billing has always been impeccable. Never once faced an incorrect charge or unexpected deduction. The recharge plans have evolved well over time and pricing remains competitive against newer carriers entering the market.
Recharge plans are okay. Nothing special compared to competition.
ngl disappointed with the new pricing. used to be affordable but now every plan costs 30-40 more than before. not getting better service for the increase

The billing department resolved my overcharge issue within 24 hours of raising the complaint. Very professional handling. They credited back the amount and also gave me a small goodwill bonus as compensation. Impressed with how seriously they treated my concern.
Pricing is standard for the industry. Nothing out of line.
intrenet speed is slow but the recharge plan pricing is fair for what you get. billing is also correct every time so no complaints on the money side of things
Terrible value for money. Paying top price for bottom service.

The quarterly recharge plan at 699 rupees offers truly outstanding value. You get 1.5GB daily data for 84 days with unlimited calls and 100 SMS per day. Compared to buying monthly plans separately this saves you about 200 rupees over the same period. Smart pricing decision by the company.
Billing is fine. No errors in my recent statements.
plz reduce the pricing on ur plans. everything is too costly now. even the basic plan costs 149 for just 14 days validity. not sustainable for students
Good value for the premium plan. Internet speed and call quality both justify the higher price I pay. The billing is always accurate and the recharge process through the app is seamless and quick.
Recharge plan variety is decent. Standard options available.
v bad billing practices. charged for VAS services without my consent. had to call 3 times to get refund. waste of time and money

The pricing on the new unlimited plans is actually competitive now. They seem to have listened to customer feedback and brought rates in line with market expectations. I compared the top three carriers and this one edges ahead slightly on overall value for money.
Value for money is average. Not great not terrible.
omg the billing is so messed up. random charges appearing every month that nobody can explain. called custmer care 4 times still no proper explanation. switching carriers next month for sure

Happy with the current recharge plan benefits. Good data allocation and fair pricing for the market segment I fall into. Billing is always on time and the app sends reminders before validity expires which helps me plan my recharge ahead.
Pricing could be better but it is what it is.

The value for money has dropped significantly in the past year. They keep reducing benefits while maintaining or increasing the price. My 399 plan used to give 3GB daily but now only gives 2GB for the same amount. This is not how you retain loyal customers.
Billing is straightforward. Nothing unusual on my statements.
reacharg plan is too costly for what u get. 249 for 1.5gb daily when others give 2gb at same price. no value for money at all

The new family plan offers incredible value for households with multiple connections. We have four lines on one account and the combined pricing saves us nearly 40 percent compared to individual recharges. Billing is consolidated into one clear statement monthly.
Recharge plans are overpriced. Competitors are much cheaper.
tbh the billing system works fine. never had wrong charges. pricing is standard nothing special but not unreasonable either

I switched to this carrier primarily because of their competitive pricing and I have not been disappointed. The 499 plan gives me everything I need for a month and the billing transparency gives me confidence that I am not being overcharged silently.
No value for money whatsoever. Complete waste of my budget.

The pricing on data add-on packs is reasonable and the billing process for purchasing them through the app is seamless. I often buy the 98 rupee 6GB addon when I need extra data and it gets activated instantly with clear balance reflection.
Recharge plan is adequate for my basic needs. Standard offering.
intrenet speed terrible and pricing too high for such bad service. not getting any value for the money i spend every month. worst carrier i have used
Good pricing on the student plan. Affordable for young users.

I feel the recharge plans need a complete overhaul. The current lineup was designed years ago and does not reflect modern data consumption patterns. Most people need at least 3GB daily now but the plans offering that amount are priced as premium which makes no sense.
Billing is fine. Standard monthly cycle with no surprises.
cant blv how expensive the plans have become. used to be the affordable option but now pricing is same as premium carriers without the premium service quality

The value for money proposition is strong on their postpaid plans. Unlimited data with rollover minutes and international calling included at 999 rupees monthly is hard to beat. The billing is automated and arrives like clockwork on the first of every month.
Average pricing. Neither cheap nor expensive for the market.
plz explain the extra charges on my bill this month. 47 rupees for premium content i never subscribed to. this keeps happening every 2-3 months. sort out ur billing system

The current recharge plan I use at 599 for 84 days gives outstanding value. Unlimited calls, 2GB daily data, and free OTT subscriptions included. At roughly 7 rupees per day this is the most economical way to stay connected with all the extras.
Billing needs improvement. Too many unexplained small charges.

The value for money on this network is acceptable. Pricing is in line with what competitors charge and the recharge plans cover the basics I need. Nothing exceptional but also nothing to complain about. A middling experience overall.
Billing transparency is acceptable. Charges are listed.
ngl the recharge plans are getting worse every revision. less data more money shorter validity. where exactly is the value for money in this equation. might switch soon

Decent pricing for the data speed and coverage I get in my area. The recharge plans are structured logically and I find it easy to pick one that fits my monthly budget. The billing always matches what was advertised with no unpleasant surprises.
Value for money is poor given the frequent network issues.
Recharge plan benefits are satisfactory for the cost involved.
prblm with billing every single month. last 3 months i have been overcharged and have to call each time to get correction. this is unacceptable for a major carrier. fix ur systems

The annual plan at 2999 is absolutely the best value for money I have found in the prepaid segment. It works out to just 8 rupees per day for 2.5GB data and unlimited calls. I recommended it to my entire family and they all switched within a week.
Pricing is fair for postpaid users. Reasonable monthly charges.

The billing on my postpaid connection has been wrong for three consecutive months now. Each time there are random VAS charges that I never subscribed to. Customer care promises to fix it but it recurs every single billing cycle. I am exhausted from fighting this.
Decent value for money. Plans are adequately priced.
ur pricing is a rip off compared to what we get. slow intrenet, poor coverage and high bills. zero value for the money charged
Recharge plan variety is adequate. Usual options for every budget.

The billing transparency on postpaid is exemplary. Every charge is itemized and explained. The pricing for my plan feels justified given the premium internet speed and excellent call quality I receive. Genuine value for money that I do not find with other carriers.
Overpriced plans. Not competitive at all anymore.
Recharge plans are okay for basic usage. Fair enough pricing.
custmer care kept me on hold for 30 minutes just to dispute a billing error of 20 rupees. the pricing of plans has gone up but service quality has not. terrible value for money overall

I appreciate the flexible recharge plan options available now. Whether you need a weekly top-up or an annual commitment plan, there is something at every price point. The billing is always accurate and the app makes it easy to compare plans before recharging.
Standard billing. Nothing notable in either direction.
omg they increased all plan prices again without improving anything. same old slow internet same coverage gaps but now 20 percent more expensive. absolutely no value for money anymore
Pricing on the student plan is average. Similar to other carriers.

The value proposition has clearly eroded over time. When I first joined three years ago this was the most affordable carrier with the best plans. Now the pricing is at par with premium carriers but the service quality remains budget level. Very disappointed with the direction.
Billing is always correct. Standard monthly cycle.
plz bring back the old 199 plan with 2gb daily data. the new pricing gives less data for more money. not fair to loyal custmers who have been here since the beginning

Solid value for money on the work-from-home plan. Good balance of data and call benefits at a reasonable price point. The billing integrates well with my company expense system since they provide proper GST invoices every month.
Recharge plan prices are steep. Needs revision downward.

Value for money is neither good nor bad on this carrier currently. They sit right in the middle of the market in terms of what you pay versus what you receive. Billing accuracy is good which I appreciate. The recharge plans could offer slightly more data to stand out.
Good pricing on international roaming packs. Very competitive.

The billing department charged me for a plan upgrade I never requested. When I contacted them they said it was a system error but could not reverse it until the next billing cycle. This kind of carelessness with customer money is completely unacceptable and erodes all trust.
Fair pricing for the 5G plans. Early adopter friendly rates.
v bad value for money on this network. paying 399 per month and getting pathetic speeds. the reacharg plans look good on paper but actual experience is very different
Billing cycle aligns with my salary date. Convenient timing.

The pricing revision they did last quarter was actually customer-friendly for once. They reduced the cost of the popular 2GB plan by 20 rupees while maintaining all benefits. The new recharge plan at 179 is genuinely good value and the billing reflects the correct amount without issues.
Pricing is acceptable for urban users. Manageable monthly cost.
reacharg plans have become too expensive for middle class users. 249 for basic plan is not affordable when u compare with other options available in market. billing also confusing sometimes

Excellent value for money. The premium plan justifies its cost with fast speeds, wide coverage, and free OTT subscriptions bundled in. My billing is always accurate and the recharge process through UPI is instantaneous. Cannot ask for more at this price.
Overcharged on my last bill. Waiting for resolution from support.

The recharge plans are reasonably priced for what they include. Nothing to write home about but nothing to complain about either. Standard market offering with standard pricing that delivers standard value. Billing works without any glitches which is all I really ask for.
Happy with the value I get for the price. Satisfactory service.
tbh ok pricing but nothing that makes this carrier stand out from the crowd. recharge plans are similar to what everyone else offers. billing works fine at least so thats a plus
